sources.title: Uzun İnce Bir Yol, Turkish Movie
sources.description: Uzun İnce Bir Yol, Turkish Movie https://www.tsa.org.tr/en/film/filmgoster/909/uzun-ince-bir-yol

metadata.Plot: For the holiday, Müsfik returns to Turkey from Germany, but causes a traffic accident on the road, killing several people. The Grim Reaper decides to takes his life, but Musfik manages to make a pact with the reaper, if he can find anybody who will give their life to Reaper instead of Müsfik, he'll be forgiven.
metadata.Actors: Tarik Akan, Taner Barlas, Caren Liby
